orchestrator.description: Orchestrates sub-agents for the Senseware wearable project. Reads code, manages memory, delegates work — never edits files or runs builds directly.

firmware.description: ESP32 firmware engineer. Handles Arduino/C++ code for FreeRTOS tasks, sensor integration, I2C peripherals, and Edge AI inference on the YD-ESP32.

ml-engineer.description: Python ML engineer. Builds and trains autoencoder models in TensorFlow/Keras, processes CSV baseline data, and exports .tflite headers for ESP32 deployment.

dashboard.description: Web dashboard developer. Builds the caregiver Vue 3 frontend using Server-Sent Events (SSE) to stream real-time telemetry from the ESP32 WiFi HTTP server.

design-agent.description: Multimodal design agent powered by GLM-4.6V. Can review and analyze images/screenshots, generate new images via GLM-Image API, and provide visual feedback on layouts and UI design.
